# The Iron and Oak Podcast

> The Iron and Oak Podcast is a Scripture-centered show hosted by Tyler Preisser and Lincoln Myers from Hays, Kansas. Season One, "Foundations of the Faith," covers 12 episodes across five phases: Foundation, The Fall, Redemption, The Christian Life, and Hard Questions. The show is built for younger Christian men navigating doubt, hard questions, and honest faith.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/) — Main landing page with show overview, mission, and mailing list
- [Episodes](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/episodes) — All 12 episodes of Season One
- [Questions](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/questions) — 109 searchable faith questions explored across all episodes
- [Series](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/series) — Season One structure: five phases, twelve episodes
- [About](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/about) — About the show and hosts
- [Subscribe](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/subscribe) — Join the mailing list
- [Contact](https://theironandoakpodcast.com/contact) — Get in touch

## Hosts

- **Tyler Preisser** — Co-Founder and host. Co-Founder and CPO at R Squared AI Inc. Based in Hays, Kansas. Fort Hays State University graduate (B.S. Engineering Design and Technology). Protestant/Reformed Christian.
- **Lincoln Myers** — Co-Founder and co-host. Full bio coming soon.

## Season One: Foundations of the Faith

1. Phase 1: Foundation — Is Scripture Sufficient? / The Character of God / The Trinity
2. Phase 2: The Fall — Why Does Sin Separate Us from God?
3. Phase 3: Redemption — Is Jesus Really God? / The Resurrection / What Is the Gospel?
4. Phase 4: The Christian Life — The Holy Spirit / The Church / Can You Lose Your Salvation?
5. Phase 5: Hard Questions — Why Does God Allow Suffering? / The Ultimate Hope
